docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION OF RELEASE OF LIEN FILED BY PETITIONER CHIU, MONA HEARING SET FOR MAY-07-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER CHIU, MONA
PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION FOR RELEASE OF LIEN; NOTICE OF HEARING FILED BY PETITIONER CHIU, MONA SERVED APR-07-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT WANG, YE HAI (MAX WANG)
LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER MONA CHIU'S PETITION OF RELEASE OF LIEN IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DECREE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR # 5220
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-07-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER CHIU, MONA AS TO RESPONDENT WANG, YE HAI (MAX WANG)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CHIU, MONA RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT WANG, YE HAI (MAX WANG) $1,000.00 CIVIL PENALTY, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, PETITIONER ENTITLED TO COSTS. PROPERTY IS RELEASED FROM THE CLAIM OF LIEN OF RESPONDENT: 208 GENVIEW DR. SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94131 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
COPYING FEES PAID BY PETITIONER CHIU, MONA
